title: rubus nemorosus subsp. horridus
intro: Rubus nemorosus subsp. horridus is a subspecies of the bramble plant, specifically a type of blackberry native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus nemorosus subsp. horridus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
